title: GoCell Assembly Descriptor
description: Defines an Assembly, the physical packaging unit. An assembly groups cells into a single deployable binary. Boundary information is generated into a separate file by tooling.

id.description: Unique assembly identifier. Must equal the directory name under src/assemblies/.

cells.description: List of cell ids included in this assembly.

entrypoint.description: Path to the main.go entrypoint, relative to the repository root.
